name: ds4cc
description: Read-only guidance for browsing the reviewed DS4CC catalog through its MCP tool.

interface.longDescription: Read-only skill for using the browse_ds4cc_marketplace MCP tool, assessing reviewed result metadata, and treating optional install commands as inert text requiring independent review.
defaultPrompt: Show me the reviewed DS4CC catalog.
Use the DS4CC browse tool to find a visualization plugin.
Compare the capabilities and source provenance in reviewed results.
